about.title: About Me
about.description1: I am a software developer specialized in creating robust and secure applications. My focus is on software architecture, backend development with Java, and implementing QA practices to ensure code quality.
about.description2: My goal is to become an elite software architect, with a strong emphasis on cybersecurity and development best practices.
